sections.title: Part 1
sections.description: 会話の応答 — 会話の最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを選びなさい。

questions.prompt: What will the woman most likely say next?

choices.text: Sure, I'd love to join you.

questions.explanation: 男性が「今夜映画を見に行かない？」と誘っていますが、女性は予定があるので断る流れが自然です。選択肢4が正解です。
questions.script:
M: Hey, would you like to go see a movie tonight? I heard the new action film is really good.
W: ___

questions.prompt: What will the man most likely say next?

choices.text: I'll check the schedule right away.
I don't think we need a reservation.

questions.explanation: 女性が「会議の時間を確認してくれる？」と依頼しており、男性は「すぐにスケジュールを確認します」と応答するのが自然です。選択肢1が正解です。
questions.script:
W: Could you check when the meeting with the client is scheduled for next week?
M: ___

sections.title: Part 2
sections.description: 会話の内容一致 — 会話の内容に関する質問に答えなさい。

questions.prompt: What does the woman decide to do?

choices.text: Ask a colleague for a ride.

questions.explanation: 女性は「早い電車に乗って余裕を持って到着する」と決めています。選択肢1が正解です。
questions.script:
M: The conference starts at 10 a.m. Are you driving there?
W: I was thinking about it, but traffic can be unpredictable. I think I'll take the 7:30 train instead. That way I'll arrive with plenty of time to set up for my presentation.
M: Good idea. The station is right next to the conference center.

choices.text: He does not understand the assignment.
He missed the deadline for the report.
He needs to change his research topic.

questions.explanation: 男性は「課題の内容がよく分からない」と相談しています。選択肢2が正解です。
questions.script:
M: Excuse me, Professor. I'm having trouble with the assignment you gave us last week. I'm not sure what kind of sources we should use for the research paper.
W: You can use academic journals, books, and reliable online sources. I'll send the class a more detailed guide by email tonight.
M: Thank you. That would be really helpful.
